programme.desc: In the inspiring true-life drama THE MIRACLE SEASON, one girl's story leads her team and town to victory.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: A basketball coach has a winning team when Hurricane Katrina hits. He tries to build a winning team anew.

programme.title: A Better Life
programme.desc: A gardener in East L.A. struggles to keep his son away from gangs and immigration agents.

programme.title: Priceless
programme.desc: A man driving a truck discovers what he is delivering and is faced with a life-changing choice.

programme.title: The Nature of Romance
programme.desc: A busy travel writer goes glamping at a state park with her best friend and finds herself falling in love with one of the park rangers.

programme.title: Shadow of Fear
programme.desc: When a young man accidentally kills someone, he is plunged into a rich man's world of blackmail and murder.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: The Runner
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the 2010 BP oil spill, an idealistic but flawed politician (Nicolas Cage) is forced to confront his dysfunctional life after his career is destroyed by a sex scandal. With Sarah Paulson.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A distant father (Kevin Sorbo) and a lost girlfriend to his best friend (Ben Davies) leads Nathan (Jason Burkey) on a journey of rediscovery.

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: Journalist Amy goes undercover at a happiness retreat and falls for Paul, the investor's son.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: Crimes Of The Mind
programme.desc: A woman spends five years trying to get her brainwashed daughter back from a cult.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole's career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers (2011)
programme.desc: A gifted ensemble cast sparks this bold retelling of Alexander Dumas' classic tale of friendship and heroism. With Christoph Waltz as wily Cardinal Richelieu.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: Robert Redford stars as Jay Gatsby, who had once loved beautiful, spoiled Daisy Buchanan (Mia Farrow), then lost her to a rich boy. But now Gatsby is mysteriously wealthy...and ready to risk everything to woo Daisy back.

programme.title: Goodbye, Columbus
programme.desc: Neil is a poor Bronx librarian and Brenda is a pampered Jewish princess from Westchester. Benjamin and MacGraw are superb in their film debuts as the lovers who try to cross class lines amidst kisses and her parents' stiff opposition.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Croczilla
programme.desc: A 36-foot crocodile goes on a rampage in Beijing after being moved from a peaceful farm to the hideout of a local gangster, who plans to slaughter the crocodile and use its meat.

programme.title: Hard Time: Premonition
programme.desc: In this continuation of the "Hard Time" saga, Detective Logan McQueen (Burt Reynolds, "Boogie Nights") is on the hunt to stop a terrorist responsible for a series of attacks in Miami.

programme.title: The Sentence Of Michael Thompson
programme.desc: In 1994, Michael Thompson was arrested for selling three pounds of cannabis and was sentenced to 42 to 60 years in prison. He is the longest serving non-violent offender in the history of Michigan and he is finally up for clemency. A DOCUMENTARY+ original.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"
programme.desc: Narrated by Tim Blake Nelson, this is an ode to the body's five senses delivered by a man with little time left to enjoy them. An Oscar nominated DOCUMENTARY+ Original. Directed by Jared and Jerusha Hess.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: Fight or Flight chronicles the journey of the first female pilot employed by Colorado Parks and Wildlife. Drawn to flying as a means to flee her early trauma, she pursues a career in professional aviation and discovers she must first assemble the tools required to face her past and heal. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Side By Side
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves takes an in-depth look at the future of digital cinema, featuring interviews with cinematic masters James Cameron, David Fincher, David Lynch, Martin Scorsese, Steven Soderbergh and more.

programme.title: The YouTube Effect
programme.desc: Director Alex Winter explores the ascension and acceleration of YouTube, a video-sharing website that started with humble origins and has gone on to change how we experience the world. With exclusive access to some of YouTube's biggest stars, the film presents an eye-opening and troubling look at the platform now so powerfully embedded in our lives.

programme.title: All Man: The International Male Story
programme.desc: All Man: The International Male Story tells the remarkable journey of how an unlikely band of outsiders designed one of the most sought-after mail-order catalogs of the 70s and 80s. International Male's lasting impact on fashion and masculinity would forever change the way men look at themselves, at each other, and how the world would look at them.

programme.title: The Underwoods of Napa Valley
programme.desc: Unemployed chef, Briana Rutledge, inherits her grandmother's cottage in Napa, California. She sets out to turn the cottage into her dream restaurant, but Tiffany Young and her father, restaurateur Nathaniel Young, plot to run Briana out of town.

programme.title: Street Dreams: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After a traumatic event that takes the life of a young Elijah Wilkins' childhood friend, Elijah meets an FBI agent that sets him on the right path. He vows to indirectly avenge his friend's death by becoming an undercover cop for the LAPD with hopes of working his way into the counterintelligence division of the FBI. When he stumbles upon a case involving domestic terrorism, Elijah sees this case as the perfect opportunity that could possibly usher him in the FBI, but not without risking it all.

programme.title: Her Happy Place
programme.desc: Tasha lost her job and her boyfriend. Even worse, she lost the love for herself. Her friend Felicia helps her time travel to find when she lost her self love hoping they can get it back.

programme.title: The Love We Had
programme.desc: One decision results in a tragedy that threatens to rip a young couple apart at the seams while essentially destroying everything and everyone who means the most to them.

programme.title: Love Possibly
programme.desc: Love possibly follows Alex, a hopelessly romantic, rom-com obsessed virgin on a quest to find love. Alex quickly finds himself out of his depth when Lana, a Moldovan mail-order bride makes the bold decision to move to London to marry him.

programme.title: The Bet
programme.desc: A woman makes a bet with her husband that she can get the next man she sees to propose. enter Albert, a lonely, eccentric man who believes he will never be loved, in this delightful, hilarious film about marriage, love and second chances.

programme.title: Lust For Love
programme.desc: Astor spoils his one chance at love with his lifelong crush, Mila. Convinced he needs help to win her back, he engages her ex-best friend to teach him how to woo women.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: The story of a teenage boy who deals with the ups and downs of being lethally attractive. Starring Brandon Flynn, Julia Goldani, and Ki Hong Lee.

programme.title: Hickey
programme.desc: Nerdy but lovable, Ryan has less than a day to save the store he hates, if he's to have any chance at winning the heart of the girl he loves.

programme.title: Three For The Show
programme.desc: A Broadway musical comedy star marries her dead husband's songwriting partner, only to have husband number one show up at the wedding.

programme.title: Our Wife
programme.desc: A self-pitying, drunken composer finds inspiration in a new woman only to have his ex-wife decide that she now wants him back.

programme.title: The Loves Of Carmen
programme.desc: THE LOVES OF CARMEN follows a fiery Gypsy girl as she brings her lovers to ruin.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: A spoiled heiress falls in love with the cynical newspaperman she enlists to help her escape her domineering father

programme.title: I Dreamed Of Africa
programme.desc: A daughter of privilege gambles on love and a risky move to one of the most unyielding spots on Earth the wilds of Africa.

programme.title: Tempest
programme.desc: A man going through a mid-life crisis moves his family to Greece and falls in love with another woman.

programme.title: Grace Kelly
programme.desc: Cheryl Ladd is Grace Kelly, the high-society beauty who became an Oscar®-winning actress and then a European princess. The movie retraces the stormy relationship between Grace and her gruff Philadelphia millionaire dad, Jack Kelly to Grace finally finding love with Prince Rainier of Monaco (Ian McShane).

programme.title: Mrs. Winterbourne
programme.desc: Connie, unwed and pregnant, is heading to Boston by train when she meets wealthy newlyweds, Hugh and Patricia. When the train crashes, Connie is mistaken for the new Mrs. Winterbourne whom no one had met. Connie plays along especially after meeting Hugh's handsome twin brother, Bill.

programme.title: Brave Warrior
programme.desc: A federal government agent joins the legendary Chief Tecumseh in an effort to keep the British from inciting war between the Americans and the Shawnee.

programme.title: Blackjack Ketchum, Desperado
programme.desc: A legendary gunslinger joins his fiancee in outlaw-ruled Oxhorn, hoping to live down his deadly reputation.

programme.title: Wyoming Renegades
programme.desc: Brady Sutton, former member of the Butch Cassidy gang, returns from years in prison and tries to go straight.

programme.title: The Man From Laramie
programme.desc: A soldier's quest to avenge his brother's death pits him against an aging cattle baron and his psychotic son.

programme.title: Riders Of The Northwest Mounted
programme.desc: Fur thieves, who murder trappers when they refuse to give up their pelts at a low price, occupy the attention of the Royal Northwest Mounted Police. The leader of the gang is Victor Renaud (Dick Curtis), also the mayor of the small Canadian town where the gang is headquartered.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: Short Rope for a Tall Man
programme.desc: Lucas is threatened with hanging by a lynch party when some horses he has purchased in a neighboring town turn out to be stolen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Lady Gaga
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013 marks the superstar's first full concert since the The Born This Way Ball. It is an eight song set containing the world premiere of seven tracks from her fourth album, ARTPOP: "Aura" "MANiCURE" "Artpop" "Jewels N' Drugs" ft. T.I., Too $hort and Twista "Sexxx Dreams", "Swine" and "I Wanna Be With You", a song that transformed into "Dope" for ARTPOP. During the concert, captured stunningly in HD, Gaga says that she's "a bit like Dorothy right now." The stage is her Kansas, the crowd is her family, and their reunion is pure magic. Lady Gaga, her dancers, and her band traverse through visual and musical themes of love, sex, violence, beauty, danger, empowerment, hustle, lust, and above all ART. Throughout, Gaga lays her heart bare for the audience and the cameras with every note sung and every word spoken.

programme.title: Eva Luna

programme.title: La Clínica

programme.title: Secretos de Villanas
programme.desc: Secretos de Villanas - S02E09 - ¿Cómo Durmieron?: Mientras las Villanas comparten en el jacuzzi, Gaby recibe una sorpresa que logra ponerla de buen humor.

programme.title: La Mujer de Judas
programme.desc: La Mujer de Judas - Bajo Amenazas: Romero detiene a Úrsula por ayudar en la fuga de Narda a quien no localizan, pero la bruja jura que fue bajo amenazas que la obligo la demente mujer.

programme.title: Vivir a Destiempo
programme.desc: Vivir a Destiempo - Amor de Juventud: Alejandro y Paula hacen realidad su amor de juventud y olvidan sus frustrados matrimonios, por ahora. Juntos, hacen planes para casarse.

programme.title: Canela News Hoy
programme.desc: Canela News, Noticias, Deportes y Más... Gratis De Lunes a Viernes 6PM ET/3PM PT y su repetición 11PM ET/8PM PT

programme.title: Ponle Canela
programme.desc: El mundo del entretenimiento, la fama y el éxito a su alcance. Todas las Noticias del espectáculo: entrevistas exclusivas a deportistas, artistas y cantantes estrenos, conciertos, coberturas y mucho más.

programme.title: Bocetos
programme.desc: Bocetos - Cambios Parte 2: La relación de Diego con Fernanda se fractura. Diego abre un blog para publicar sus ilustraciones y Lucía se entera que tiene cáncer.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Cambios: Selim y Erdogan hablan con sus padres. Fatmagül se prepara para un gran cambio en su vida. Mustafá sigue desesperado y jura vengarse cueste lo que cueste.

programme.title: Amor real Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Doña Juana busca al general Domínguez para averiguar sobre la declaración de Amadeo Corona y él le dice que tiene una declaración firmada, donde niega todo vínculo con Fuentes Guerra. Manuel retira su dinero del banco.

programme.title: Corazón Indomable Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Esther le dice a José Antonio que es tarde para no ser nada, pues está embarazada. Raiza le informa a María Alejandra que Karim compró parte del casino.

programme.title: Destilando Amor Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Aarón le entrega a Oñate el dinero que supuestamente le entregó a Gaviota para alejarse. Gaviota y Rodrigo sufren al sentirse traicionados. Sofía termina por caer antes los encantos de Francisco.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Teresa recibe de Arturo un lujoso auto como regalo de bodas. Mariano descubre que Teresa sí se casa. Mariano interrumpe la ceremonia, Teresa le da una cachetada. Teresa y Arturo se convierten en marido y mujer.

programme.title: Rubí Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Sonia se encela porque Alejandro pasa tiempo con Maribel. Tras saber que Cristina no puede dejar de pensar en Cayetano, Marco decide alejarse de ella. Rubí le hace creer a Sonia que Alejandro pasó la noche con ella.

programme.title: Fuego en la Sangre Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Sofía regresa a su casa con Juan para no perder su amor, él promete esperar el tiempo que sea necesario para acercarse a ella.

programme.title: Al Diablo con los Guapos Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Hugo regresa a la mansión, pero solo recuerda el amor que siente por Mili. Hugo le pide a Mili que retomen sus planes de casarse. Alejandro le muestra a Mili y a Hugo una grabación donde confiesa haber ayudado a Andrea con su falso embarazo.

programme.title: Vino el amor Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Bobby le dice a David que se escondió porque vio unos folletos de internados en el cuarto de Graciela. David le confiesa a Graciela que le atrae, pero que no pueden estar juntos.

programme.title: Amor real Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Matilde se sorprende al ver el rostro desfigurado por los golpes de Amadeo Corona y Benítez al ver su desconcierto, aprovecha para confundirla diciéndole que, si ese es el hombre que fue a su casa buscando a Manuel.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 68
programme.desc: Malvina teme que la policía descubra que ella es la responsable de la desaparición de María Mercedes. María Mercedes decide darles todo su dinero a los Del Olmo.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 21
programme.desc: Angélica le regala ropa y algunas joyas a Marimar para después acusarla de ladrona. Marimar se entera que está embarazada de Sergio.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 22
programme.desc: Angélica obliga a Marimar a levantar una pulsera del lodo con los dientes, después la acusa de haberle robado las joyas y es detenida por la policía.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 73
programme.desc: Alicia sufre al saber que debe regresar a casa de Soraya. María idea un plan para evitar que Soraya maltrate a Alicia. Nandito enfrenta a Soraya para pedirle que se aleje de su familia.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 74
programme.desc: Soraya planea todo para que culpen a Nandito de la muerte de la Nana Calixta. María se molesta con Luis Fernando porque continúa bebiendo.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 69
programme.desc: María Mercedes decide regresar a la vencindad. Jorge Luis se niega a aceptar el dinero de María Mercedes. Malvina enfurece al saber que Jorge Luis siente una fuerte atracción por María Mercedes.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 70
programme.desc: Jorge Luis encuentra a María Mercedes en la calle y la lleva a su casa para arreglar su situación. María Mercedes sufre al ver a Jorge Luis cerca de Mística. Rodolfo descubre que Magnolia ha empeñado todas sus joyas.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 23
programme.desc: Los abuelos de Marimar mueren en un incendio mientras ella está en la cárcel, Angélica la visita y le da la noticia.

programme.title: Lo Que La Vida Me Robó Capítulo 110
programme.desc: Graciela le revela a Fabiola que sabe la verdad sobre su pasado y le pide que le dé la parte de su herencia. José Luis le dice a Esmeralda que está dispuesto a recuperar el amor de Montserrat.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Teresa se entera que Fernando puso a nombre de Luisa la mansión De La Barrera y se enoja mucho. Luego chantajea a Fernando para que ponga la casa a nombre de ella. A Juana y Cutberto les niegan la adopción de un niño.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Teresa se entera que Rubén es amante de Genoveva. Fito amenaza a Rubén con una pistola, Genoveva lo golpea y lo mata. Teresa es testigo de cómo Rubén y Genoveva se deshacen del cuerpo de Fito.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Teresa le deja claro a Fernando que no tendrá intimidad con él hasta que estén casados. Teresa le revela a Aída que Genoveva es amante de Rubén. La policía detiene a Mariano por ser sospechoso principal de la muerte de Fito.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Fernando estalla de celos cuando se entera que Teresa está defendiendo a Mariano junto con Arturo. Teresa ve a Arturo y Lucía besándose. Oriana le ofrece mucho dinero a Teresa para que se aleje de Fernando, ella considera la propuesta.

programme.title: Juro Que Te Amo Capítulo 13
programme.desc: José María decide cuidar de Coralito en lo que encuentran un hogar para ella. Malena y Mariela enfrentan a Antonia y Violeta frente a todo el pueblo al creer que querían engatusar a Justino. Debido a los rumores que hay en el pueblo, Violeta pierde su tra

programme.title: Juro Que Te Amo Capítulo 14
programme.desc: Debido a la depresión en la que está Antonia, Violeta le confiesa la verdad a Alejandro. Claudio golpea a Justino para defender el honor de Antonia y su familia. Justino le confiesa a Malena que fue Antonia quien lo hizo caer y ella lo corre de su casa.

programme.title: Abismo de Pasión Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Damián lleva serenata a la casa de Elisa y le grita que es lo peor que le ha pasado en la vida. Alfonsina le aconseja a Florencia que aproveche que tiene el camino libre para reconquistar a Damián. Elisa y Damián tienen el corazón destrozado.

programme.title: Soy Tu Dueña Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Ivana enfurece al saber que Valentina ha decidido casarse con José Miguel. José Miguel idea un plan para evitar que Valentina piense que se casa con ella solo por interés. Valentina le cuenta a Benita el por qué se enamoró de José Miguel.

programme.title: La Usurpadora Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Paulina está decidida a quedarse en la cárcel y rechaza la ayuda de Edmundo. Estefanía le entrega sus joyas a Willy para que consiga dinero y puedan pagar la clínica. Lourdes se niega a darle dinero a Osvaldo para pagar la defensa de Paulina.

programme.title: El Manantial Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Héctor está decidido a conocer el nombre de sus padres y, por ello, busca a Álvaro. Mientras, Margarita encuentra el resultado de ADN y Justo decide tomar acciones al respecto. Luego, Alejandro se entera de algo grave. ¿Será un impedimento para su boda?

programme.title: Imperio de Mentiras Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Darío visita a Piedad, pero llega Leonardo a detenerlo y esto provoca un enfrentamiento que podrá terminar en una desgracia. Victoria termina su relación con Eugenio. José Luis le pide a Adriana renunciar.

programme.title: La Gata Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Mercedes le confiesa a la Jarocha que ha permitido que Lorenza se lleve a los niños, ella le dice dice que esa mujer es capaz de robárselos. Mariano descubre que le hace falta uno de los papeles en blanco que le firmó el Fernando.

programme.title: La Que No Podía Amar Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Ana Paula y Rogelio deciden adoptar a Margarito. Rosaura se niega a aceptar que Ana Paula adopte a Margarito. Gustavo le confiesa a Ernesto que Ana Paula fue su novia.

programme.title: Sortilegio Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Fernando despide a Katia de la empresa al saber que es cómplice de Bruno. Victoria se pone mal al saber que Alex y María José no vivirán con ella después de la boda.

programme.title: La Familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico está muy triste porque Federica está terriblemente enferma. Ludovico la lleva al hospital para que la operen.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Es fin de semana y Fran se va a dormir con su papá, pero Paco tiene planes y se va a una boda con Miranda su novia. Fran se queda solo en casa e invita a dormir a Lola. A la mañana siguiente los 4 desayunan y se presentan.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Rocío llega a casa de Paco y Miranda para quedarse el fin de semana porque se metió un ratón a su casa y están fumigando. Miranda le pide a Paco que corra a Rocío de su casa, pero él le dice que no puede porque es la madre de Fran.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos. El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, sólo que Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. Averigua cuál será el nombre completo de su hijo y quiénes serán sus padrinos. Además, checa qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento.

programme.title: XH DRBZ
programme.desc: En las ‘5 Herencias' presentan los legados que los reporteros le dejan a las siguientes generaciones. El chef ‘Pepe Roni' prepara un delicioso ‘Cuete Mechado' y unos ‘Huevos Patuleños'.

programme.title: XH Derbez
programme.desc: En ‘La paz sea por todas partes' Nicolás Tranquilino pierde los estribos, sale de su equilibrio cósmico y ataca al Dalei Lame. El Lonje Moco platica la historia de Ana Guevara.

programme.title: Hotel Todo Incluido Capítulo 4
programme.desc: Por culpa de Carmelo, el chef Oropeza renuncia por lo que Jacky busca un chef gourmet para el Hotel Todo Incluido.

programme.title: Hotel Todo Incluido Capítulo 5
programme.desc: La llegada de dos luchadores al Hotel Todo Incluido desatará confusiones, enredos y bajas pasiones.

programme.title: Nosotros Los Guapos Capítulo 23
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden organizar un espectáculo de lucha libre en una escuela primaria y así compartir su buena fortuna con los niños, pero dos luchadores no llegan al evento y los guapos tienen que improvisar.

programme.title: Nosotros Los Guapos Capítulo 24
programme.desc: Vítor cree haber encontrado a la mujer de su vida y planea casarse con ella, pero Albertano descubre que es una peligrosa criminal e intenta impedir la boda.

programme.title: María de Todos Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa le consigue trabajo a Albertano presentando Placentex Antiesponge. Doña Lucha se pone muy celosa porque María le plancha la ropa a Albertano.

programme.title: María de Todos Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Albertano y María pasan una tarde romántica hasta que recuerdan que tenían que cuidar al Chino.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: El tío de Renata y Licha le anuncia a Plácido mediante una carta que irá de visita a su casa. Mira a qué se deberá su llegada y si les dará gusto verlo. Además, descubre cuál es el origen del odio entre la Nena y Martina.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina desea ser monja porque Augusto terminó con ella. Paula busca a Diego y le pide que regresen. Damiana organiza una cena, para que Celina conozca a Francisco. Diego perdona a Paola, pero no regresa con ella. Roberta besa a Simón por venganza.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Nico termina su noviazgo con Karen. Para herir a Roberta, Paula le dice que se reconcilió con Diego. Teo es aceptado en la Logia. Mía le reclama a Roberta que haya usurpado su identidad. En lugar de Teo, Miguel planea asistir a su ceremonia de iniciación.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lupita habla con Pilar y le dice que se la pasa bien con Tomás, pero con el solo escuchar el nombre de Nico, todo se le olvida. El padre de Diego le regala un auto lo cual le molesta, porque solo trata de comprar su cariño. Teo es capturado por La Logia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Valeria le propone a Franco vivir juntos, él le dice que lo ha pensado, pero no puede porque Mía es su prioridad y debe estar libre para ella.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: La banda se entera que Gastón estuvo en el café y los vio tocar. Galia habla con Pilar y le dice que cada una deberá enfrentar sus errores. Mía pelea con Miguel por culpa de Luz Viviana, ella amenaza con contarle a su papá que está en la banda.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Giovanni logra escapar de La Logia, Miguel y los demás chicos denuncian con el director que Giovanni y Teo no están en el Colegio. Tomás y Lupita están discutiendo y escuchan un golpe, es Giovanni quien cae de la azotea.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Afortunadamente Teo no está muerto, Enrique y los chicos lo reaniman mientras esperan a los paramédicos. Carlo le dice a Alma que alguien debe poner a Roberta en su lugar. El director Pascual no cree en la existencia de La Logia.

programme.title: Cañaveral de Pasiones Capítulo 40
programme.desc: Pablo le dice a Julia que viajará a la ciudad con Gina por el accidente que tuvo. Guillermo le dice a su padre que no quiere trabajar con él. Josefina descubre que Gina le mintió, pues se da cuenta que si puede caminar.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 131
programme.desc: Gonzalo se encuentra muy grave en el hospital luchando por vivir debido al impacto de arma de fuego que le propició Josefina, Regina de igual manera está hospitalizada pero no de gravedad como Gonzalo.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 132
programme.desc: Álvaro se encuentra en la calle y a lo lejos se ve a una mujer que viene hacía él hablando por celular entonces él aprovecha y la aborda rápidamente la empuja y se va para atrás.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 133
programme.desc: Josefina se encuentra dentro de la cárcel con sus malos pensamientos deseando que Gonzalo y su pareja se mueran, quiere matar a Renata y siente que la va a matar por que no quiere que nadie sea feliz.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 134
programme.desc: Roberta visita a Josefina en la cárcel, está furiosa por saber o intuir que su madre fue la causante de la muerte de su ex prometido, se da cuenta que Regina hubiera sido mejor mamá que su madre adoptiva.

programme.title: Simplemente María Capítulo 10
programme.desc: Cristóbal le revela a María que consiguió un consultorio y un médico para cuando dé a luz. Alejandro le cuenta a Adolfo que buscó a María porque quiere hacerse cargo de su hijo, pero que ella lo rechazó.

programme.title: Simplemente María Capítulo 11
programme.desc: María comienza el trabajo de parto. Vanessa pone un medicamento en la bebida de Estela para provocar que se vaya de la fiesta y así poder quedarse a solas con Marco. Con ayuda de las monjas de la clínica, María da a luz a su hijo.

programme.title: Simplemente María Capítulo 12
programme.desc: Estela le pregunta a Karina si Marco regresó a la fiesta y bailó con Vanessa. María les pide a Pina y a Cristóbal que sean los padrinos de su hijo. El patrón de María trata de abusar de ella, por lo que María huye con su hijo.

programme.title: El Cristo de los milagros
programme.desc: Un grupo de bandidos planea el robo de la Iglesia. Un niño que se gana la vida como vendedor ambulante es utilizado para informar sobre las pertenencias del Sacerdote. Una turista se entera del robo y pronto la secuestran.

programme.title: Novias impacientes
programme.desc: Un pintor, un médico y el hijo de un millonario son objeto de un enredo en un edificio. Ellos devuelven la broma y conocen a unas mujeres, con quienes inician un noviazgo. Pero una confusión provoca que el amor de Marta y Carlos casi llegue a su fin.

programme.title: El mundo loco de los jóvenes
programme.desc: Un famoso cantante intenta seducir a una chica cantante, primero como una apuesta con sus amigos, pero poco a poco se va enamorando de ella. ¡Ahora, sus amigos deben tomar el relevo o se quedarán en el polvo!

programme.title: Con quién andan nuestras hijas
programme.desc: La historia de un grupo de jóvenes y los problemas a los que se enfrentan dentro de una sociedad moderna que poco a poco entra en decadencia, debido a la desintegración familiar y a la pérdida de valores.

programme.title: Los Sánchez deben morir
programme.desc: Gaspar no logra impedir que sus mujeriegos hijos eludan por quinta vez el matrimonio. Luego de provocar una pelea los hermanos Sánchez no saben donde ir y menos ahora que los han acusado de una muerte.

programme.title: El vestido de novia
programme.desc: Un ingeniero lleva a una prostituta al campamento maderero donde trabaja ya que sólo se admiten a empleados casados. Las cosas se ponen un poco agitadas cuando las otras esposas comienzan a hablar sobre cuánto tiempo han estado casadas.

programme.title: Dos pesos dejada
programme.desc: Un joven conductor de taxis llamado Fermín, es apasionado de las mujeres y sus encantos. En la conquista por una joven hija de un comerciante adinerado, las cosas se salen de sus manos y debe lidiar con las consecuencias.

programme.title: Acá las tortas
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige un pequeño, pero muy exitoso restaurante. El único fracaso de los suyos es, quizás, su hijo Vicente, un hombre borracho y atormentado. Sus hijos se avergüenzan porque su negocio es demasiado vulgar.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Doncellez y preñez, no puede ser a la vez'
programme.desc: Una joven sueña con dedicarse al baile a pesar de la oposición de su padre. La joven y sus amigas entran a una academía de baile con uno de los mejores profesores, sin saber que su amistad se verá fracturada por las oscuras intenciones del maestro.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'En casa del pobre, el que no trabaja no come'
programme.desc: Una joven descubre lo mucho que su mamá sufre y hace para mantener un hogar machista cuando sufre un infarto y ella debe encargarse de los quehaceres de la casa.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer se encuentra en condiciones de extrema pobreza y decide abandonar a su hija en casa de su madre. Debido a su enfermedad, la abuela recurre a la tía de la niña para que la ayude a cuidarla, pero las cosas no salen como ellas esperan.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Más vale pájaro en mano que ciento volando'
programme.desc: Después de perder a sus padres, una joven se va a vivir a casa de su padrino. La joven busca progresar en el diseño de modas, pero su padrino pone freno a su entusiasmo haciéndole ver que aún no está preparada y que debe aprender.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'El que se casa, para su casa'
programme.desc: Una joven desea casarse a pesar de la oposición de su madre, quien solo busca sobreprotegerla. En un acto desesperado por detener a su hija, la madre le confiesa que está enferma de cáncer.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.desc: Un joven trata de esforzarse en la vida y en el trabajo, pero es explotado por su madre y mal influenciado por sus compañeros de trabajo. Cuando el joven conoce a una bailarina, él se obsesiona con ella, sin saber que solo lo quiere por dinero.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'En la guerra y en el amor todo se vale'
programme.desc: Un grupo de jóvenes atraviesan por diversos problemas de amor y rivalidades en el salón de clases. Los jóvenes tendrán que aprender a dejar sus diferencias de lado y ser mejores personas.

programme.title: Como Dice El Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'El que limpio juega, limpio se queda'

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is story about hope for the future in the face of heartbreaking tragedy, when "Making It Right" takes on a new meaning- completing an unresolved renovation and making it possible for a family to finally begin the healing process after the loss of a loved one. The connection between the emotional health of a family and condition of their home is a strong one. Mike and the team heal a house left in limbo, and make it a home once more.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Janet and her elderly mother, Audrey, upgraded their vinyl kitchen floor to ceramic tile. Shortly after the work was completed, they noticed hairline cracks through the centre of the tiles. The flooring contractor explained it wasn't his fault, and that the weak structure of their home was shifting and causing the floor to crack. But the cracks were forming through the ceramic tile, and not along the grout lines- the weakest part of a tile floor. Mike and the team put on their investigative hard hats and get to the bottom of this tile flooring issue.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This Home Bar Has It's Own Keg And A Built-In Wine Chiller
programme.desc: In this episode General and Cristina Judd from Me and General Design tackle the playroom. This family-friendly lounge is packed with everything you need for your pod. From a surfboard sound system to a bar with a mini kitchen with its own and not to mention a beer tap. If this bar is the place to be then we don't know what is.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This Room Has Unobstrcuted Views of the Rocky Mountain
programme.desc: When you have an unobstructed view of the Rocky Mountains as your backdrop, basic goes out the window. For Houston designer Lucinda Loya, this space is much more than a living room. With a floor-to-ceiling fireplace, gallery art and an oversized sectional this is the perfect spot for working from home, lounging with family, or watching the sunset.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This Nature-Inspired Dining Room Has Its Own Indoor Swing
programme.desc: This Nature-Inspired Dining Room Has Its Own Indoor Swing

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This Is The World's Most Organized Kitchen
programme.desc: Kitchens should no longer be pretty. Designer Sarah Robertson of New York's Studio Dearborn created a space with function for every culinary level and age group. With handmade tiles, panel fronts on refrigeration and under-counter storage, this kitchen is a multigenerational space with style to spare.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This is the Outdoor Patio and Fireplace Lounge Area
programme.desc: Tasked with a massive covered area, Portland-based designer Max Humphrey approached it like an indoor great room, dividing this vast space into zones: a living room, an afternoon reading section and of course a ping-pong table neat the eating area. Noz Nozawa is known for many things, but subtlety is not one of them - and we are so grateful for it. For this home, she brought every ounce of her passion for colorful design to the game room and lounge she designed.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This is the Tea Room and Shed
programme.desc: Houston-based designer Marie Flanigan concocted the ultimate ode to her Southern roots: a room dedicated to tea. With bountiful seating, brass detailing, and red walls ina high-gloss finish, this room is a much-needed quiet moment for one. What busy parents really need is some quality alone time. It was with this in mind that husband-and-wife Brett and Kara Phillips, of High Street Homes, dreamt up a 440-square-foot back house, dubbed "The WeShed." Part indoor hangout space and part covered patio. The perfect place for a getaway without really leaving your home.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our college chapters. Hudson has been a long time member of TTHA as well as serving with the Texas A&M Chapter. We have a great time at G2 in pursuit of Axis deer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Over the years we have been able to hunt with a lot of amazing people. This episode takes us to Las Palmas ranch to hunt with Payton Angelle. Payton was awarded this hunt from the amazing people over at Sky High for kids.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they chase Whitetails at Morrow Ranch. This is a hunt that they had purchased earlier at the Disabled Outdoorsman in the year to be able to spend some time in the woods. A few days away to relax and spend quality time with loved ones should always be a priority. Morrow Ranch is definitely a go to place for low fence Texas hunting.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: WE join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father of 5. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable. Bobby has an action packed 2 day hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: This spring, our crew was able to dive into some turkey hunting at the G2 ranch with long time TTHA Members Mike Reeber and Dan Marcasol. After a slow start, the crew was finally able to connect on a great Rio Tom and a few hogs. Learning and sharing the stories of TTHA members is something we strive to do each year.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder's life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you'd see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly's story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Six Mile Hill Ranch in Crowell, TX plays host to our TTHA Crew this week while we learn how Courtney Shaheen grew up in the outdoors and ultimately pursued her career as a Taxidermist. Courtney shares her path to becoming a world class taxidermist with Double Nickel Taxidermy and she even gets to take her biggest buck to date with the Six Mile Hill crew!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Josh Kinser from Big and J introduced his daughters to hunting throughout South TX. With trips earlier in the year cancelled, Josh and Hattie were invited to join the TTHA crew at G2 ranch. The first night of the hunt proved to be a success for Hattie, wrapping a TX tag around her biggest buck. Josh and Hattie will have memories to last a lifetime after this hunt!
